description:
Configure bcWebCam for a hands-free kiosk-style deployment. You need to enable two specific settings: 

1. Enable the 'Always on Top' window mode so the scanning window remains visible over other applications.
2. Set the scanner to continuous/auto-scan mode so it automatically detects barcodes without manual triggering.

Once both settings are enabled in the application's interface, ensure they are applied and leave the application running and visible on the screen.
